purpose: Replace over-complex internal ISA/comment chaining with deterministic role FSM. ISA/comment remains external entrypoint and audit trail, but not the internal workflow bus.

cycle_controls.monitoring_rule: Ignore terminal cycles. Mark active cycles stale_timeout when updated_at is older than max_cycle_age_minutes.
cycle_controls.step_limit_rule: Count every non-terminal role dispatch and role result. If step_count exceeds max_role_steps_per_cycle, mark cycle step_limit_exceeded, write ROLE_CYCLE_STEP_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, post BEM blocker report, and do not dispatch the next role.

provider_layer.rule: role sequence decides who is next; provider router decides who performs that role
